evidence: Added internal LivePreviewDecorationKind 'line' mapped to CodeMirror Decoration.line at line start. Implemented private blockquote renderer in packages/editor/src/live-preview/renderers.ts, included in defaultLivePreviewRenderers without a new package-root named export. Blockquote renderer emits one z-live-preview-blockquote-line range per source line, uses activationFrom/activationTo per line, and skips suppressed code ranges. Verified pnpm test -- tests/editor-live-preview-blocks.test.ts and pnpm --filter @zorid/editor run typecheck.
